headline: NYSE Owner Moves Deeper Into Crypto. This Top Fund Manager Is Bullish on Its Stock
summary: Intercontinental Exchange is investing in crypto exchange OKX at a $25 billion valuation. Barron’s Roundtable member Todd Ahlsten of Parnassus likes the stock because of its diversification efforts.

raw.headline: NYSE Owner Moves Deeper Into Crypto. This Top Fund Manager Is Bullish on Its Stock
raw.summary: Intercontinental Exchange is investing in crypto exchange OKX at a $25 billion valuation. Barron’s Roundtable member Todd Ahlsten of Parnassus likes the stock because of its diversification efforts.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Brush Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

raw.headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Brush Off

headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Berkshire Hathaway, KLA, CME Group, Natural Health Trends and Good Times Restaurants
summary: KLAC rides AI-driven semiconductor demand with strong share gains, while BRK.B and CME face mixed pressures despite solid long-term business strengths.

headline: Sen. Merkley proposes prediction market ban for government officials after Maduro, Iran bets
summary: After a series of dubious bets placed on the ouster of Venezuela's Maduro and Iran strikes, lawmakers are looking to ban insider trading on prediction markets.

raw.headline: Sen. Merkley proposes prediction market ban for government officials after Maduro, Iran bets
